textByHashes.50112be833c689d7f1a628e648a88e09e5c14865: Well if memory serves me correctly. I think my granddad mentioned that they robbed one of our camels. A heinous crime.
textByHashes.ee24f6bc35784a81a7ce22d5e3f3546bad027e59: Those Menaphites would never do that. They have no sense of honour.
textByHashes.e7efc51d06bc9c8b9b0afe4f6eedfa689340256d: Really? I knew they were cowards. Tell them that we have changed our minds and demand 10 camels in return for our mercy.
textByHashes.5c20e9739524eab403ace3fff2418d7c85b117d6: Get out of here, you Menaphite dog!
textByHashes.e22ab982a4c66103c14ce7daba8e22c152fa3c14: Me? No, no, I was just, er, complimenting your, that is - don't kill me, please!
textByHashes.26e93c78384da1269bc7639c9e79e8d92cc7ed61: Welcome. Our leader would be pleased to congratulate you on your disposal of the Menaphites who plagued this town.
textByHashes.da5b07d28b63b0f33a536b529bb32352eef948d5: You dog! You killed our champion and for that I hope you die a slow and painful death.
textByHashes.1720c46d98a0fc7607517840eeea86308582f1a0: I'm too busy for chitchat. Come back if you have some business to discuss with us.
